description: SURFACE-1 declare-or-exempt registry. Every catalog surface (skill, workflow, tool, agent) either declares deterministic routing (a routing.yaml sidecar) or carries an exemption here with a reason. check-registry.py routing fails on a surface that is neither, on an exemption for a surface that no longer exists, and on a surface that is both declared and exempt. Exemption is the DEFAULT POSTURE for knowledge skills — declaring is the deliberate act.
